speaker: speaker1
text: Hi Melissa , are you going home this weekend ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , not this weekend . I have too much work to do .

speaker: speaker2
text: My father lives in Washington DC .

speaker: speaker2
text: My mother died two years ago .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , I am sorry to hear that . Is your father still working ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have any family here ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , two of my cousins live here and my aunt and uncle live about 30 miles from here .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have any brothers or sisters ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I have two brothers who live in New York and a sister who lives in Boston .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you see them a lot ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not as much as I'd like to . Usually just on holidays like Thanksgiving and Christmas .
